achievements.title: Master of Bubbles
achievements.description: On a new game, collect the Bubble Gun early on within Anything but Tangerines in Difficult mode and bring it to the end of the stage.

achievements.title: Scooby-Doo
achievements.description: Complete Puppy Love Part 1 on Difficult WITHOUT making Peter Puppy mad.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Questions From Worms
achievements.description: In Villi People, bring at least 9 mealworms to The Game Show.
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: At Least This Isn't the 50s
achievements.description: In Villi People, answer at least three questions correctly during The Game Show. Good luck!
achievements.author: lonegraywolf2000

achievements.title: Memory Madness
achievements.description: In Villi People, repeat all 12 sequences without error in the Memory Game.

achievements.title: Test Your Jumping Might!
achievements.description: In Inflated Head, win at least three times on the High Striker.

achievements.title: Claws Encounters of the Non-Furred Kind
achievements.description: Get to the high striker in one life WITHOUT being popped by Evil the Cat.
